---
name: 🧩 New Framework
about: Propose a new reasoning framework to add to the skill
title: "[FRAMEWORK] "
labels: enhancement, framework
assignees: ''
---

## Framework Name
e.g., Socratic Method, Inversion Thinking, Red Team / Blue Team

## Problem Types It Solves
What kind of problems does this framework address?

## How It Works
Describe the step-by-step process of applying this framework.

## Example
Provide a brief example of this framework in action.

## References
Links to articles, papers, or books about this framework.
